creator: thomas@bsdunix.ch
text:
Hello

On 05/24/12 10:50, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/libvanessa_adt,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/168297 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/168297

Patch looks ok. Please commit it. Thank you.

Regards,
Tom
